{% extends "base.html" %} {% block content %}

{{ 'Edit' if vendor else 'New' }} Vendor

{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
{{ form.vendor_code.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.vendor_code(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.vendor_name.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.vendor_name(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.contact_person.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.contact_person(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.email.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.email(class="form-control", type="email") }}
{{ form.phone.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.phone(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.mobile.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.mobile(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.gst.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.gst(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.default_currency.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.default_currency(class="form-select") }}
{{ form.lead_time.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.lead_time(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.address.label(class="form-label") }}{{ form.address(class="form-control", rows="3") }}
{{ form.is_active.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.is_active() }}
Cancel
{% endblock %}
